name: Wisconsin Auto Title Loans, Inc.
description_short: Wisconsin Auto Title Loans offers title loans up to $15,000 and signature installment loans up to $1,500 with quick online applications and same-day funding at their Kenosha, WI location.
description_long:
Wisconsin Auto Title Loans, Inc. operates a physical storefront at 3825 60th Street in Kenosha, Wisconsin, providing secured and unsecured short-term lending solutions to consumers facing immediate financial needs. The company serves the emergency cash market by specializing in auto title loans, where borrowers use their vehicle's title as collateral, alongside signature installment loans that don't require collateral.

The company offers three primary loan products: online title loans, in-person title loans, and signature installment loans. Title loans are available up to $15,000, while signature installment loans max out at $1,500. They emphasize a "quick & easy online application process" and advertise themselves as offering "the fastest title loans Kenosha WI has to offer." The company operates Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM and Saturday from 9 AM to 1 PM, with Sunday closures.

Wisconsin Auto Title Loans distinguishes itself through multiple application channels (online and in-person), transparent disclosure practices including dedicated FAQ pages for each loan type, and published rates, fees, and terms. The company requires electronic consent for disclosures and offers SMS account notifications. They maintain a consumer disclosure page and provide detailed information about required items and the loan process before application.

As a title loan lender, the company serves consumers in genuine financial emergencies, though title loans carry inherent risks including potential vehicle loss if loans aren't repaid. The $15,000 maximum title loan amount is significantly higher than typical payday loans, making this suitable for those with substantial immediate needs and vehicle equity. Borrowers should carefully review the rates, fees, and terms before proceeding, as title loans often carry high APRs and short repayment terms.
pros: Offers title loans up to $15,000, providing access to larger amounts than typical payday loans for consumers with vehicle equity
Multiple application channels: quick online application process plus in-person visit option at physical Kenosha location
Transparent disclosure practices with dedicated FAQ pages for each loan type (online title loans, title loans, and signature installment loans)
Published rates, fees, and terms available on website for consumer review before application
Extended business hours including Saturday (9 AM-1 PM) for working consumers
Offers signature installment loans up to $1,500 as a non-collateral alternative to title loans
SMS account notifications available for account-related messages and payment reminders
cons: Title loans require vehicle title as collateral, creating risk of vehicle repossession if loan terms aren't met
Maximum signature installment loan amount of $1,500 is relatively low for non-title loan needs
Website does not display specific APR ranges or fee schedules, requiring consumers to visit location or call (262-654-1131) for pricing information
Limited hours (closed Sundays and weekday evenings after 6 PM) may be inconvenient for some consumers
No information provided about whether rates, fees, and terms vary by state regulations or individual credit profile
best_for: Vehicle owners facing immediate emergency expenses who have substantial equity in their car and can afford monthly payments
Consumers seeking larger emergency loans ($5,000-$15,000) who would struggle to qualify for traditional personal loans
Working professionals in the Kenosha, Wisconsin area who can visit the physical location during business hours
Borrowers who prefer in-person interactions and want to review loan documents before signing
diagnosis: Wisconsin Auto Title Loans is best for vehicle owners in the Kenosha area with immediate emergency cash needs and sufficient vehicle equity who can manage the risks of collateral-based lending. The critical caveat is that title loans carry high APRs and short repayment terms with real risk of vehicle loss—consumers should exhaust alternatives like credit unions, employer advances, or credit card options before using vehicle title as collateral.
services: Online auto title loans up to $15,000
Electronic disclosure delivery and document storage
FAQ resources for each loan product type
In-store consultations at 3825 60th Street, Kenosha location
Published rates, fees, and terms documentation
meta_description: Wisconsin Auto Title Loans offers title loans up to $15,000 and installment loans up to $1,500 with quick approval and same-day funding in Kenosha.
